Nameplate capacity, or best available data, of the unit in megawatts
see rows 14-23 above

value_definitions.name: announced
value_definitions.definition: The unit has been described in corporate or government plans but concrete steps such as applying for permits have not yet been taken.

value_definitions.name: pre-construction
value_definitions.definition: The unit is actively moving forward in seeking governmental approvals, land rights, or financing.

value_definitions.name: construction
value_definitions.definition: The unit has site preparation and equipment installation underway.

value_definitions.name: operating
value_definitions.definition: The unit has been formally commissioned; commercial operation has begun.

value_definitions.name: shelved - inferred 2 y
value_definitions.definition: The unit is inferred to be shelved because no progress has been observed for at least two years.

value_definitions.name: cancelled
value_definitions.definition: A cancellation announcement for the unit has been made.

value_definitions.name: cancelled - inferred 4 y
value_definitions.definition: The unit is inferred to be cancelled because no progress has been observed for at least four years.

value_definitions.name: mothballed
value_definitions.definition: The unit is disused, but not dismantled.
